description: Sustained-trend HRV alert: fires when HRV stays below the user's personal baseline (or a fixed floor for cold-start users) for 3+ consecutive days. Distinct from ReadinessAlertObserver (single-day score crossing) and ReadinessAwareTrainingObserver (daily pre-training advisory) — this observer surfaces a multi-day pattern. Surfaces via push notification + Home AIInsightCard banner; the Why? affordance opens an AIIntelligenceSheet section showing the 3-day HRV mini-chart with baseline overlay. Backlog source: docs/product/backlog.md L346 (RICE 10.5 per 2026-05-31 E1 refresh).

dependencies_met.ReadinessAwareAlertStore: depends_on C2 PR #560 merge — if not merged, C4 ships its own TrendAlertStore

scope_vs_c2.c2_covers: Daily pre-training advisory: TODAY is a training day AND today's readiness suggests continue/lighten/swap
scope_vs_c2.c4_covers: Multi-day sustained-trend pattern: HRV has been BELOW baseline for 3+ consecutive days regardless of today's training plan
scope_vs_c2.shared_dependencies: Both observers consume HealthKit HRV reads via HealthKitService + emit through NotificationGateway
scope_vs_c2.trigger_windows_distinct: C2 fires at the user's learned training time-of-day. C4 fires on a daily morning evaluation (~08:00 local fallback, learnable from app-open patterns later) regardless of training schedule.
scope_vs_c2.conflict_risk: AIInsightCard + AIIntelligenceSheet edited by C2 are likely targets for C4 too. Phase 0 mitigation: defer C4's in-app surface to a follow-on commit if C2 ships first; otherwise C4 lands the patterns and C2 rebases on top.

transitions.reason: C4 from 2026-05-31 tier carryover plan (RICE 10.5; next-most-valuable C-tier item after C2 ships per E1 RICE refresh in PR #559)
Phase 0 research approved + merged to main (PR #562, 8121294). C2 PR #560 also merged (dcf30c9) clearing the shared-file conflict risk — proceeding with Option A from research.md scope_vs_c2 plan.

Operator approved PRD via 'approved' directive. Phase 2 (Tasks) tasks.md authored — 14-task breakdown covering 5 new source files + ReadinessEngine.personalBaseline stddev: extension + 4 modified UI files + 4 modified analytics/settings files + 4 test files (~41 tests total) + case study + showcase MDX + backlog strike.
Operator approved Phase 4 (Implement) kickoff via 'go' directive. T1-T14 begin. Branch: feature/trend-alerts-hrv (Mode C compliant — no infra-path edits).
Phase 4 implementation closed via PR #564 (Phase 0+1+2+4 single-session ship); ~31 tests pass; build green.
CI checks green; operator review preceded merge.
Case study at docs/case-studies/trend-alerts-hrv-case-study.md shipped in feature PR. Closure (state flip + backlog strike + state.json link) ran 2026-06-03 via L1 follow-up.

Feature CLOSED. ~31 tests pass; T7 helpers scope-shifted from ReadinessEngine to TrendAlertTrigger.swift per Phase 4 decision (keeps the high-risk-area file untouched). Known platform-wide gap: v2-observer daily-trigger wire-up is not yet built (affects C2 + C4 + ReadinessAlertObserver equally); deferred to v7.9.1-era work item.

kill_criteria_resolution: pending_t14_eval_2026-06-17 — all 5 kill criteria carry calendar-anchored T+14d evaluations per case study frontmatter (action-taken rate 14d, false-positive 30d, push-fatigue 30d, adoption 30d, daily-trigger latency 14d post-wire-up). kill_criterion_fired: false at closure.
